summary: Iteration 24: Starmap/Route Planner Visual Overhaul Testing - Complete verification of animated starmap canvas with requestAnimationFrame animation loop, nebula effects per system, pulsing glowing nodes, animated route lines, smart labels, HUD scan-line sweep, and all route planner functionality. Backend 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend all features working correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: RoutePlanner.jsx uses requestAnimationFrame animation loop correctly with cleanup on unmount
Canvas uses ResizeObserver to properly size itself after layout (fixes 300x150 default issue)
useEffect depends on [loading] to avoid running animation before canvas exists
stateRef pattern used so animation loop reads latest state without re-creating the loop
500 stars with twinkling animation (Math.sin-based alpha variation)
Per-system nebula radial gradients with system-specific colors (stanton=blue, pyro=red, nyx=purple)
Node types have type-specific rendering (stars=multi-layer glow, planets=atmospheric gradient, gateways=diamonds, cities=dots+rings)
Route lines have animated flowing dashes with lineDashOffset tied to time
HUD scan-line sweep effect using linear gradient that moves vertically
Smart labels based on zoom level (LABEL_MIN_ZOOM per type)
Console hydration warnings are from development tooling, not actual bugs
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - Star system data from star_systems.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 verified complete visual overhaul of Starmap/Route Planner. Key features tested: (1) Animated canvas with requestAnimationFrame loop, (2) ResizeObserver properly sizes canvas, (3) 500 twinkling stars, (4) Per-system nebula gradients, (5) Type-specific node rendering (stars=glow, planets=atmosphere, gateways=diamonds), (6) Animated route lines with flowing dashes, (7) HUD scan-line sweep effect, (8) Smart labels based on zoom, (9) Map zoom/pan/reset all working, (10) Hover tooltip shows location info. All three tabs (Route, Interdiction, Chase) fully functional. Backend returns all required data including route_lines for interdiction visualization.
